mods.name: PartEditor
mods.author: Cucumber Space
mods.description: The parts editor is capable of editing the width, height, rotation, and position of the top and bottom parts of components.

mods.name: UI Tools
mods.author: Cucumber Space, Neptune-Sky
mods.description: This mod serves as a dependency for other mods; it doesn't do anything on its own besides providing a UI to control parameters for other mods.
